name: custom-css
description: An extension for Google Chrome to add custom CSS on websites.

scripts.dev: rm -rf dev && tsc --project tsconfig.dev.json && cd dev && ln -s ../manifest.json && ln -s ../_locales && ln -s ../node_modules && cd src && ln -s ../../src/icons && cd popup && ln -s ../../../src/popup/index.html && ln -s ../../../src/popup/style.css &&  cd ../../../ && tsc --project tsconfig.dev.json --watch
scripts.pack: rm -rf dist && tsc && cp manifest.json dist/ && cp -r _locales dist/ && cp src/popup/index.html src/popup/style.css dist/src/popup/ && cp -r src/icons dist/src/ && mkdir -p dist/node_modules/codemirror/lib dist/node_modules/codemirror/mode/css dist/node_modules/codemirror/addon/display && cp node_modules/codemirror/lib/codemirror.css node_modules/codemirror/lib/codemirror.js dist/node_modules/codemirror/lib/ && cp node_modules/codemirror/mode/css/css.js dist/node_modules/codemirror/mode/css/ && cp node_modules/codemirror/addon/display/placeholder.js dist/node_modules/codemirror/addon/display/
